title: Group_by across two dimensions
prompt: Write `MyApp.Blog.post_counts_by_category_and_month/0` that groups posts by `category_id` AND the month of `inserted_at`, returning `{category_id, month, count}`. Use `fragment("date_trunc('month', ?)", p.inserted_at)` for the month bucket, group by both `p.category_id` and the fragment. Write to `lib/my_app/blog.ex`.
tier_rationale: Fragment inside group_by is unusual; must be referenced in both group_by and select for consistency.
